opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These ulcers in my mouth are so agonizingly painful that I can't even swallow a sip of tap water without wincing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The mouth ulcers are so painful I've stopped eating and drinking today and I'm worried about getting dehydrated.

symptom_narrative.onset: 3 days ago with a tingling on the inner lip
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing, can't eat or drink, hard to talk
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inside my cheeks and lower lip
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no blisters beforehand, no fevers, no swollen glands
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get these every few months, usually when stressed, but this is worse

past_medical_history.how_managed: they usually settle on their own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; recent stress; poor intake today

objective_data_offered.value: a few round ulcers with yellow-grey centre and red rim inside cheeks/lip, visible on video
no food or fluids today due to pain
